MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
